title: angelonia ciliaris
intro: Angelonia ciliaris, also known as the tropical angelonia or blue sage, is a flowering plant species native to tropical America, characterized by its vibrant blue or white blooms and slender, upright stems. The leaves and flowers of Angelonia ciliaris have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to their antibacterial and antiviral properties. Consuming Angelonia ciliaris is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Angelonia ciliaris is often combined with other plants to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections.
